title: Code for fluorescence intensity ratio calculation of plant nuclei
author: Matsunaga Sachihiro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We develop a live imaging system that allows them to track the spatiotemporal dynamics of RNA polymerase II modification in single cells in Arabidopsis thaliana. This approach potentially enables a more detailed understanding of transcriptional dynamics in plants. We uploaded a code for fluorescence intensity ratio calculation of plant nuclei in Shibuta et al., 2021.
steps_raw: We develop a live imaging system that allows them to track the spatiotemporal dynamics of RNA polymerase II modification in single cells in Arabidopsis thaliana. This approach potentially enables a more detailed understanding of transcriptional dynamics in plants. We uploaded a code for fluorescence intensity ratio calculation of plant nuclei in Shibuta et al., 2021.
keywords: arabidopsis thaliana, RNA polymerase II ser2P, live imaging
